title: 2023 Press Releases
summary: This is an index/listing page aggregating all Federal Reserve press releases from calendar year 2023. It is not a single document but rather a chronological enumeration of dozens of distinct announcements including FOMC minutes, enforcement actions, regulatory proposals, banking applications, and other administrative matters. The page is not directly relevant for targeted macro catalyst or market structure analysis as it lacks the depth and specificity of individual documents.
key_points: This is a listing page, not an archiveable source document
Contains mixed content types: FOMC minutes (monetary_policy), enforcement actions, regulatory proposals, banking applications, and institutional announcements
FOMC minutes releases appearing here include: October 31-November 1, 2023 (released 11/21), September 19-20, 2023 (released 10/11), and July 25-26, 2023 (released 8/16)

Several regulatory actions cited relate to market structure: proposed rule on large bank long-term debt (8/29/2023), guidance on resolution planning (8/29/2023), debit interchange fee proposal (10/25/2023)
Source is stale: all content from 2023, approximately 2+ years old relative to TODAY
Individual press releases should be extracted and archived separately for meaningful analysis
why_it_matters: This listing page serves only as a finding aid to locate individual Fed press releases. It has no standalone analytical value for macro catalyst or market structure research. Researchers should access the specific FOMC minutes, rate decisions, or regulatory documents directly rather than this index.

issues_found: PAGE_TYPE is listing_page — per CORE RULES Rule 5, listing pages must be rejected
Source is a container/index page with no standalone analytical content
event_type set to 'unknown' — no valid event_type applies to a listing page
published_at is empty — listing page covers entire 2023 calendar year but has no specific publication date
Source is stale — all content is from 2023, approximately 2+ years before TODAY (2026-03-31)
Cannot extract meaningful market structure or macro catalyst signals from an index page
No verifiable claims to check — source aggregates dozens of unrelated announcements

notes: Source is non-archiveable listing page. Each individual press release referenced herein (FOMC minutes, regulatory proposals, enforcement actions) would constitute a separate archiveable document. Recommend crawling individual release URLs rather than this index page for meaningful research archive content.
